sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66268" key="menekra/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μενε-κράτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n66268.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abiding in strength</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στῦλος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0350.tlg001:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dionys.Trag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
